name: Dimensional Alchemist
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>次元合成師</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディメンション・ケミストリー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn: You can activate this effect; banish the top card of your Deck, and if you do, until the end of this turn, this card gains 500 ATK. When this card you control is destroyed and sent to your GY: You can target 1 of your banished monsters; add it to your hand.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can activate this effect; banish the top card of your Deck, and if you do, until the end of this turn, this card gains 500 ATK. When this card you control is destroyed and sent to your GY: You can target 1 of your banished monsters; add it to your hand.
eff: Once per turn: You can activate this effect; banish the top card of your Deck, and if you do, until the end of this turn, this card gains 500 ATK. When this card you control is destroyed and sent to your GY: You can target 1 of your banished monsters; add it to your hand.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Adds banished cards to the hand
banished: Banishes from the top of your Deck
